source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the diagram, within quadrilateral $ABCD$, $AC$ and $BD$ intersect at point $O$. Point $E$ is the midpoint of side $BC$. If $AB = 4$, what is the length of $OE$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} In quadrilateral $ABCD$, $AC$ and $BD$ intersect at point $O$,\\
$\therefore$ $BO=DO$,\\
$\because$ point $E$ is the midpoint of side $BC$,\\
$\therefore$ $OE$ is the median of $\triangle ABC$,\\
$\therefore$ $OE = \frac{1}{2}AB = \boxed{2}$.
